query:
SELECT 
  'debt_target_cache' AS source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT contract_external_id) AS cancelled_count
FROM debt_target_cache
WHERE contract_status = 'ยกเลิกสัญญา'
  AND section = 'Fastfone365'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'contracts' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS cancelled_count
FROM contracts
WHERE status = 'ยกเลิกสัญญา'
  AND section = 'Fastfone365';
